## Source: amazon-inspector (a0d343f604565676254c8b24e997c84396038593cf5259c15d044ec3c5ab3350)
The package corstoken was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (097340794c59c9f02cad5b4690aa47bc5011e379b30d8a9ac654913a38cca13f)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'corstoken' @ 2.14.7 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
